text:
The Homeomorph tautological-action file faithfully mirrors the Mathlib `Equiv.Perm.applyMulAction` API (instance + `@[simp] smul_def` + `applyFaithfulSMul`), so that surface is complete. For `Deck`, the surface is minimal, bodies are unexposed, and `mem_iff`/`comp_eq`/`proj_smul` give the membership and projection characterization. One automation gap.

Verifying the smul bridge: `Subgroup.smul_def` (`./mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Subgroup/Actions.lean:35`) is *not* `@[simp]`, and `Homeomorph.smul_def` only matches a `Y ≃ₜ Y` element, not a bundled `Deck p` element. So `p (h • e)` cannot be reduced by `comp_eq` (`@[simp]`) under simp — `proj_smul` is the only lemma that closes it, yet it is not `@[simp]`.

TAUCETI-VERDICT-847726660e0a005a2f6aee9a

{"verdict": "request_changes", "summary": "Minimal surface, bodies hidden, and the membership/projection characterization is present. The key equivariance lemma proj_smul lacks @[simp] even though no simp lemma can otherwise reduce p (h • e).", "findings": [{"file": "TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/UniversalCover/Deck.lean", "line": "59", "issue": "proj_smul (p (h • e) = p e) is the characteristic equivariance lemma for the action but is not @[simp]. comp_eq is @[simp] but cannot rewrite p (h • e): Subgroup.smul_def is not a simp lemma and Homeomorph.smul_def matches only E ≃ₜ E elements, not Deck p, so p (h • e) is stuck under simp.", "fix": "Add @[simp] to proj_smul (LHS strictly simpler, fires only on this pattern, terminates).", "evidence": "./mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Subgroup/Actions.lean:35 `lemma smul_def ... := rfl` has no @[simp]; Homeomorph.smul_def at Homeomorph.lean:34 is keyed on `(f : Y ≃ₜ Y) • x`."}]}

verdict_obj.summary: Minimal surface, bodies hidden, and the membership/projection characterization is present. The key equivariance lemma proj_smul lacks @[simp] even though no simp lemma can otherwise reduce p (h • e).

findings.issue: proj_smul (p (h • e) = p e) is the characteristic equivariance lemma for the action but is not @[simp]. comp_eq is @[simp] but cannot rewrite p (h • e): Subgroup.smul_def is not a simp lemma and Homeomorph.smul_def matches only E ≃ₜ E elements, not Deck p, so p (h • e) is stuck under simp.
findings.fix: Add @[simp] to proj_smul (LHS strictly simpler, fires only on this pattern, terminates).
findings.evidence: ./mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Subgroup/Actions.lean:35 `lemma smul_def ... := rfl` has no @[simp]; Homeomorph.smul_def at Homeomorph.lean:34 is keyed on `(f : Y ≃ₜ Y) • x`.
